sentences.arabic: تَعَلُّمُ اللُّغَاتِ الْأَجْنَبِيَّةِ يُسَاعِدُ فِي تَطْوِيرِ الْمَسَارِ الْمِهَنِيِّ.
sentences.translation: Učenje stranih jezika pomaže u razvoju profesionalne karijere.
sentences.translationEn: Learning foreign languages helps in developing the career path.

sentences.arabic: تَدَرَّبَتْ لَيْلَى عَلَى مَهَارَاتِ التَّوَاصُلِ وَالْقِيَادَةِ فِي الْعَمَلِ.
sentences.translation: Lejla je trenirala vještine komunikacije i vođstva na poslu.
sentences.translationEn: Layla trained on communication and leadership skills at work.

sentences.arabic: حَصَلَتْ بَعْدَ ذَلِكَ عَلَى تَرْقِيَةٍ كَبِيرَةٍ فِي وَظِيفَتِهَا.
sentences.translation: Nakon toga je dobila veliko unapređenje na svom poslu.
sentences.translationEn: After that, she received a major promotion in her job.
